hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Marex 分析师表示，在美联储之后，加密货币市场定位为“防御性且薄弱”；【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”；【FINANCE】杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席。

items.title: Crypto market positioning is 'defensive and thin' after Fed, Marex  analysts say
items.summary: While the Federal Reserve held interest rates, Chair Kevin Warsh made it clear the U.S. central bank is more worried about inflation than growth.
items.title_zh: Marex 分析师表示，在美联储之后，加密货币市场定位为“防御性且薄弱”
items.summary_zh: 尽管美联储维持利率不变，但主席凯文·沃什明确表示，美联储更担心的是通胀而不是经济增长。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
items.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”
items.summary_zh: 央行联邦公开市场委员会将发布个人官员预期利率走向的季度更新。

items.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.summary: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.summary_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.summary_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.
items.title_zh: 主席沃什大幅改变了美联储的利率声明。这是更改的内容
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 4 月份上一次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Bitcoin slips below $64,000 as hawkish Fed overshadows signs of onchain repair
items.summary: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as BTC ETFs post an $82.2 million net outflow, and Glassnode said improving liquidity may be forming a floor.
items.title_zh: 鹰派美联储掩盖了链上修复的迹象，比特币跌破 64,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于 BTC ETF 净流出 8220 万美元，比特币维持在 64,000 美元附近，Glassnode 表示流动性的改善可能正在形成底部。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，削减声明以消除降息偏见
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: More united Fed board seen at Warsh's first meeting, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi largely forecast a unanimous decision among FOMC members at Wednesday's meeting, after April's divided vote.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，沃什的第一次会议上美联储董事会更加团结
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员在很大程度上预测，在 4 月份的投票结果存在分歧后，联邦公开市场委员会 (FOMC) 成员将在周三的会议上做出一致决定。

items.title: Hegseth Berates NATO Allies for ‘Shameful’ Response to U.S. War in Iran
items.summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth used a meeting of NATO defense ministers to continue the Trump administration’s sharp criticism of European military policies.
items.title_zh: 赫格斯斥责北约盟国对美国伊朗战争的“可耻”反应
items.summary_zh: 国防部长皮特·赫格斯利用北约国防部长会议继续特朗普政府对欧洲军事政策的尖锐批评。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Oil Prices Fall as U.S.-Iran Deal Offers Hope for Shipping
items.summary: With an initial agreement signed by both sides, oil could soon flow again through the Strait of Hormuz. But prospects for a long-term deal remained murky as talks on tougher issues loomed.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美伊协议为航运带来希望，油价下跌
items.summary_zh: 随着双方签署初步协议，石油很快就能再次通过霍尔木兹海峡。但随着更棘手问题的谈判迫在眉睫，达成长期协议的前景仍然不明朗。

items.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
items.summary: ASTER sees two-way volatility as bullish protocol-specific news meets hawkish Fed.
items.title_zh: Aster 因激进的“回购并销毁”升级而上涨超过 10%。但收益是短暂的
items.summary_zh: 随着看涨协议特定消息与鹰派美联储相遇，ASTER 预计将出现双向波动。

items.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
items.summary: The bond market is sending a signal that complicates prospects of a near-term bitcoin bull run.
items.title_zh: 债券市场正在释放明确的利率信号。比特币多头应该注意
items.summary_zh: 债券市场正在发出一个信号，使近期比特币牛市的前景变得更加复杂。

items.title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
items.summary: Kraken launches onchain DEX trading to give customers access to thousands of tokens across the Solana ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Kraken 将 Solana DEX 交易集成到核心应用程序中，并计划支持其他网络
items.summary_zh: Kraken 推出链上 DEX 交易，让客户能够访问 Solana 生态系统中的数千种代币。

items.title: ‘Bitcoin Rodney’ pleads guilty in $1.8 billion crypto fraud case
items.summary: Rodney Burton pleaded guilty in federal court over his role in HyperFund, a $1.8 billion global cryptocurrency fraud scheme.
items.title_zh: “比特币罗德尼”在价值 18 亿美元的加密货币欺诈案中认罪
items.summary_zh: 罗德尼·伯顿 (Rodney Burton) 在联邦法院承认自己在 HyperFund（一项价值 18 亿美元的全球加密货币欺诈计划）中所扮演的角色。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
items.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，他很想做空 SpaceX，但放弃了昂贵的选择
items.summary_zh: 伯里认为，该公司的市值已达到令许多老牌企业和财富相形见绌的水平。

items.title: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.summary: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.title_zh: 莫斯科遭遇俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来最大规模的乌克兰袭击
items.summary_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
items.summary: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.
items.title_zh: 涉嫌团伙头目在机场鲜花花束伏击中被枪杀
items.summary_zh: 枪手在瓜亚基尔机场外等待受害者时，将武器藏在鲜花和毛绒玩具后面。

items.title: First Russian shadow fleet tanker enters Channel since Smyrtos boarding
items.summary: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.
items.title_zh: 斯米尔托斯号登船后第一艘俄罗斯影子舰队油轮进入英吉利海峡
items.summary_zh: 货代号是一艘悬挂俄罗斯国旗的货轮，上周离开普里莫尔斯克港，于周三晚上进入英吉利海峡。

items.title: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.summary_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.summary: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.summary_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。

items.title: Ukraine Strikes Moscow Refinery in Large-Scale Drone Attack
items.summary: The attack, which shut down the capital’s airports for several hours, appeared to be the biggest wave of strikes on the city since the start of the war.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰大规模无人机袭击莫斯科炼油厂
items.summary_zh: 这次袭击导致首都机场关闭了几个小时，这似乎是自战争开始以来该市最大规模的袭击浪潮。

items.title: Afghanistan Issues Ban on Smartphones for Civil Servants and Military
items.summary: Those using their phones at work will see them smashed and face punishment, according to a written order from the Taliban government’s highest court.
items.title_zh: 阿富汗禁止公务员和军队使用智能手机
items.summary_zh: 根据塔利班政府最高法院的书面命令，那些在工作中使用手机的人将被砸碎并面临处罚。

items.title: Israel Stunned by Trump’s Iran Deal
items.summary: The agreement accomplishes none of Israel’s stated war aims and arguably leaves the country in worse shape on each of them.
items.title_zh: 以色列对特朗普的伊朗协议感到震惊
items.summary_zh: 该协议没有实现以色列所宣称的任何战争目标，并且可以说使该国在每一个目标上都处于更糟糕的境地。

items.title: Federal Reserve rolls out proposing rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
items.summary: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.
items.title_zh: 美联储推出规则制定提案，要求稳定币发行人维护客户身份识别计划
items.summary_zh: 美联储推出了一项规则，要求稳定币发行人制定一项计划来识别客户以打击非法金融。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
items.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员推测，在特朗普政府指示限制范围后，Anthropic 将迅速恢复对人工智能模型的访问
items.summary_zh: 交易员认为，访问很有可能在 7 月 1 日之前恢复。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10% while index declines
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP) fell 4.1% and Sui (SUI) dropped 4%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Stellar (XLM) 上涨 10%，而指数下跌
items.summary_zh: 互联网计算机 (ICP) 下跌 4.1%，Sui (SUI) 下跌 4%，带领该指数从周三开始走低。

items.title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
items.summary: The AgentCard integration with Visa Intelligent Commerce allows AI agents built on models from any provider, including OpenAI or Anthropic, to effect commercial transactions.
items.title_zh: Alchemy 人工智能驱动的身份和支付服务获得 Visa 网络访问权限
items.summary_zh: AgentCard 与 Visa 智能商务的集成允许基于任何提供商（包括 OpenAI 或 Anthropic）的模型构建的人工智能代理来实现商业交易。

items.title: Hive shares jumps 10% on $220m Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal
items.summary: GPU cloud contract with Bell and Cohere strengthens HIVE's shift from bitcoin mining to high performance AI computing.
items.title_zh: Hive 股价因 2.2 亿美元加拿大主权人工智能基础设施交易而上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 与贝尔和 Cohere 的 GPU 云合同加强了 HIVE 从比特币挖矿到高性能人工智能计算的转变。

items.title: The great rotation: Investors desert the Magnificent 7, crypto for AI bottlenecks
items.summary: Capital is flowing out of the largest tech companies and bitcoin as investors pile into semiconductors, memory stocks and space-related opportunities.
items.title_zh: 大轮换：投资者因人工智能瓶颈而放弃 Magnificent 7、加密货币
items.summary_zh: 随着投资者涌入半导体、内存股和太空相关机会，资本正在从最大的科技公司和比特币流出。

items.title: Bitcoin's nemesis, the Dollar Index, is on the verge of a major breakout
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 18, 2026
items.title_zh: 比特币的克星美元指数正处于重大突破的边缘
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 18 日天气预报

items.title: Tether’s XAUT gold token added to Ledn lending platform
items.summary: "When XAUT-backed loans go live, you will be able to borrow against your gold the way you already borrow against Bitcoin," Ledn said.
items.title_zh: Tether 的 XAUT 黄金代币已添加到 Ledn 借贷平台
items.summary_zh: Ledn 表示：“当 XAUT 支持的贷款上线后，你将能够以黄金为抵押进行借贷，就像以比特币为抵押进行借贷一样。”

items.title: Bitcoin miner HIVE inks $220 million AI GPU deal with Bell, expects $70 million annual revenue
items.summary: HIVE finalized a $220 million sovereign cloud contract to deploy 2,304 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs across Canada by early 2027.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿商 HIVE 与 Bell 签订价值 2.2 亿美元的 AI GPU 协议，预计年收入达 7000 万美元
items.summary_zh: HIVE 敲定了价值 2.2 亿美元的主权云合同，将在 2027 年初之前在加拿大部署 2,304 个 NVIDIA Blackwell GPU。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
items.summary: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 芝商所 (CME) 特里·达菲 (Terry Duffy) 将于 2027 年辞职，首席财务官林恩·菲茨帕特里克 (Lynne Fitzpatrick) 将出任首席执行官
items.summary_zh: 该公司周三表示，现年 67 岁的达菲将于 2027 年 3 月 1 日起担任执行董事长。

items.title: China pushes for AI safety as G7 summit wraps up without Beijing
items.summary: China included artificial intelligence in its global governance whitepaper published Wednesday, and said Beijing was speeding up cooperation efforts.
items.title_zh: 七国集团峰会在没有北京的情况下结束，中国推动人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: 中国将人工智能纳入周三发布的全球治理白皮书，并表示北京正在加快合作步伐。

items.title: Weapons, money and ships: How is this Iran deal different from others?
items.summary: BBC Verify examines how the new deal between the US and Iran affects three key areas.
items.title_zh: 武器、金钱和船只：这项伊朗协议与其他协议有何不同？
items.summary_zh: BBC verify 探讨了美国和伊朗之间的新协议如何影响三个关键领域。

items.title: Hegseth says some Nato allies will fail as he announces US review of Europe forces
items.summary: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.
items.title_zh: 赫格斯称，当他宣布美国对欧洲军队进行审查时，一些北约盟友将会失败
items.summary_zh: 在美国国防部长采取这一举措之前，美国决定缩减对联盟内高度戒备部队的承诺。

items.title: British man dies in paragliding accident in Spain
items.summary: Authorities in Catalonia confirmed that the 63-year-old died in the Palau de Noguera area on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英国男子在西班牙滑翔伞事故中丧生
items.summary_zh: 加泰罗尼亚当局证实，这名 63 岁的老人周三在帕劳德诺格拉地区死亡。

items.title: Lawyer in high-profile Ugandan treason case charged with related offence
items.summary: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.title_zh: 备受瞩目的乌干达叛国案律师被控相关罪行
items.summary_zh: 乌干达军事首领吹嘘他会给本周早些时候被捕的埃里亚斯·卢瓦戈造成“伤害和痛苦”。

items.title: Bird flu kills more than 75% of baby seals on remote Australian island, study finds
items.summary: Scientists say 13,000 southern elephant seal pups on Heard Island have died of the H5N1 strain.
items.title_zh: 研究发现，澳大利亚偏远岛屿上75%以上的小海豹死于禽流感
items.summary_zh: 科学家表示，赫德岛上有 13,000 只南象海豹幼崽死于 H5N1 病毒株。

items.title: Critics of Russia Say This Critic Isn’t Critical Enough
items.summary: Alexander Sokurov has questioned the Russian president about government repression, but he is still controversial among his country’s exiles.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯批评者称这位批评者不够批评

items.title: Iran Gets Major Economic Lifeline for Minimal Concessions in Initial Deal
items.summary: The agreement delays the most difficult steps for Iran for later talks, while granting it crucial benefits.

items.summary_zh: 该协议将伊朗最困难的步骤推迟到以后的谈判中，同时给予伊朗至关重要的好处。

items.title: Why the By-Election in Makerfield Will Have Giant Consequences for the UK
items.summary: Here is what to know about the by-election on Thursday in Makerfield, the outcome of which could lead to Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s ouster.

items.title: Archbishop of Canterbury Apologizes for Church of England’s Role in Forced Adoptions
items.summary: Tens of thousands of babies were taken from unmarried women and girls from the 1950s to the 1980s in England and Wales.
items.title_zh: 坎特伯雷大主教为英格兰教会在强迫收养中所扮演的角色道歉
items.summary_zh: 从 20 世纪 50 年代到 80 年代，英格兰和威尔士有数以万计的未婚妇女和女孩的婴儿被夺走。

items.title: Taiwan’s President Says He Trusts Trump to Approve Arms Sales
items.summary: President Lai Ching-te made the hopeful remarks after Mr. Trump suggested that he could use a proposed $14 billion arms package for Taiwan as leverage with Beijing.
items.title_zh: 台湾总统表示相信特朗普会批准军售
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普表示他可以利用拟议的价值 140 亿美元的台湾武器计划作为对北京的筹码后，赖清德总统发表了充满希望的言论。

items.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
items.summary: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Algorand 公布了到 2028 年实现量子抗性的路线图
items.summary_zh: 该公告反映出加密货币越来越认识到采用抗量子加密技术可能需要数年时间，不仅需要改变用户钱包，还需要改变核心协议基础设施。

items.title: Malta's financial regulator explores bringing parts of DeFi under MiCA's orbit
items.summary: The MFSA is seeking feedback on whether decentralization should be assessed as a spectrum rather than a binary concept.
items.title_zh: 马耳他金融监管机构探索将部分 DeFi 纳入 MiCA 轨道
items.summary_zh: MFSA 正在寻求关于是否应将权力下放作为一个范围而不是一个二元概念进行评估的反馈。

items.title: Alchemy unveils Visa-powered virtual payment card for AI agents
items.summary: AgentCard will default to Visa-issued tokens, but will support crypto and agent-native payment protocols when available.
items.title_zh: Alchemy 为 AI 代理推出由 Visa 支持的虚拟支付卡
items.summary_zh: AgentCard 将默认使用 Visa 发行的令牌，但将支持加密货币和代理本地支付协议（如果可用）。

items.title: Stablecoin compliance startup Range raises $8.3 million from fintech and crypto VCs
items.summary: "Stablecoins and fiat are converging, and finance teams need one platform to run both safely and at scale," Range CEO Andres Monteoliva said.
items.title_zh: 稳定币合规初创公司 Range 从金融科技和加密货币风险投资公司筹集了 830 万美元
items.summary_zh: Range 首席执行官 Andres Monteoliva 表示：“稳定币和法定货币正在融合，财务团队需要一个平台来安全、大规模地运行。”

items.title: Aztec investigates $2 million exploit of deprecated payments product
items.summary: The immutable stage 2 rollup was sunset in 2022, and Aztec Labs holds no admin keys or control over the system, the team said.
items.title_zh: Aztec 调查已弃用支付产品价值 200 万美元的漏洞
items.summary_zh: 该团队表示，不可变的第 2 阶段汇总已于 2022 年停止，Aztec Labs 不拥有任何管理密钥或对系统的控制权。

items.title: Tether winds down aUSDT stablecoin and Alloy platform to sharpen focus
items.summary: Tether said it is winding down the 'Alloy by Tether' platform and discontinuing support for aUSDT, a stablecoin over-collateralized by XAUT.
items.title_zh: Tether 逐步关闭 USDT 稳定币和 Alloy 平台以加强关注
items.summary_zh: Tether 表示，它将逐步关闭“Alloy by Tether”平台，并停止对 aUSDT（一种由 XAUT 超额抵押的稳定币）的支持。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Ona
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划收购 Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展 Codex，从而实现跨企业工作流程长期运行的 AI 代理。
